title: HP security advisory (AV26-539)
description: On June 1, 2026, HP published a security advisory to address a critical vulnerability in the following products:
products: HP Poly VVX  versions prior to UCS 6.4.8  Pending
HP Poly Trio 8300  versions prior to UCS 8.1.7
HP Poly Trio 8500  versions prior to UCS 7.2.8
HP Poly Trio 8800  versions prior to UCS 7.2.8
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
